title: Mp40
description: This is an Recourcepack to remodel your Crossbow
body:
This is my Recourcepack for the Crossbow It is one of my best work yet!
I have worked a couple of Minutes on this Project and wanted to show it to
the Internet. I hope You guys like it!

Btw this Recourcpack is made for 1.19.3 and **above** if something doesnt work
please send a message in the Discord :D

[https://discord.gg/vNWRpb5f](https://discord.gg/vNWRpb5f)
